title: Rust lichen-ipv6: TooShort and BufferTooSmall moved from lichen-core
description: In rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs, TooShort and BufferTooSmall error types were added. In rust/lichen-core/src/error.rs, these types are now re-exported from lichen-ipv6. This creates a circular dependency risk: lichen-core now depends on lichen-ipv6 for error types, but other lichen-* crates may expect these from lichen-core. Verify the dependency graph is correct and there are no cycles.
close_reason: False positive: The dependency is correctly one-way. lichen-core depends on lichen-ipv6, and lichen-ipv6 does not depend on lichen-core. This is the correct dependency direction - fundamental types like TooShort and BufferTooSmall are defined in the lower-level lichen-ipv6 crate and re-exported by lichen-core for convenience.
